name: Verification of current and voltage division rule
summary: Verification of Current and Voltage Division Rule in VR is a virtual reality electrical lab developed in Unity. It allows students to verify the Current Division Rule (CDR) and Voltage Division Rule (VDR) by building series and parallel circuits, connecting components, and observing real-time meter readings. With interactive wiring, connection validation, and immersive VR interaction, the simulation provides a safe and engaging way to understand current and voltage distribution in electrical circuits.
